content: 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems can be repurposed to create a recursive self-improving agent architecture where the memory module actively curates which of the agent’s own exploratory trajectories to retain, amplifying curiosity-driven learning far beyond fixed intrinsic reward modules like ICM or RND. This creates a 'memory of curiosity' loop where the agent prioritizes retaining surprising, high-learning-gain experiences that further drive future exploration.
